prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年哈尔滨工业大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4094名→3506名→2962名→1980名→4096名。2021至2024年呈持续前移趋势（从4094升至1980）， 但2025年大幅后移至4096名，回到2021年水平，波动剧烈。2025年基准位次约4096名；该校在上海市招生计划2021年20人、2022年17人、2023年11人、2024年7 人、2025年7人，呈逐年缩减后趋稳态势。2026年计划仍为7人，与2025年持平，计划端无扩缩变化，对竞争格局无直接增量影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校（C9联盟成员），软科中国大学排名2026年第12位，较2025年第14位上升2位，稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列；2026年高考周 期声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及一起谣言事件，无实质负面冲击；抖音热度排名第10（高热），综合热度约454万，短视频平台曝光量高，反映报考关注度持续升温；2024年曾出 现投档线异常信号（中性/混合），但2025–2026年未见明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达17个，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、 环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、仪器科学与技术A、土木工程A、电气工程A、软件工程A等，工科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等哈工大核心招生方向在2024–2025年均为高热推荐/推荐状态，社会热度持续偏高；上海市2026年高考考生总数约667 00人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，考生规模大幅扩张，竞争压力显著上升；哈尔滨 工业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，与上海市地理距离较远，属于跨省招生；该校在上海市招生计划仅7人，占比较小，地域偏好对上海考生报考决策有一定抑制作用，但C9名校光 环可部分抵消。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移至4096名的异常波动、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数激增约35%以及学校软科排名上升带来的吸引力增强，预计2026 年竞争将较2025年有所回升，位次小幅前移。预测最低录取位次约4016名，区间3558–4474名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（院士特色班）
- 工科试验班（尖班、港大优学班）
- 工科试验班（自主智能系统院士特色班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（未来技术拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（自主智能）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 人工智能（中关村班）（与中关村学院深度融合培养）
- 具身智能（大湾区班）（培养地点在深圳校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈工大在上海仅招7人（均为物理、化学必选），专业全部为工科试验班/特色班，层次极高。位次在预测区间3558–4474名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为 冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<3558名）可重点冲刺院士特色班和未来技术拔尖班；位次接近区间上限（>4474名）建议以具身智能（大湾区班）或人工智能 （中关村班）保底。所有专业均要求物理、化学双选，考生须确认选科符合要求。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Harbin Institute of Technology in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 4094 → 3506 → 2962 → 1980 → 4096. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous forward trend (rising from 4094 to 1980), but in 2025, it significantly dropped back to 4096, returning to the 2021 level, showing drastic fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4096; the enrollment plan in Shanghai was 20 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 7 in 2025, showing a trend of gradual reduction followed by stabilization. The 2026 plan remains at 7, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction in the plan, having no direct incremental impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university (member of the C9 League). In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 12th, up 2 places from 14th in 2025, firmly among the top engineering institutions in the country. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving only one rumor incident with no substantial negative impact. It ranks 10th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of approximately 4.54 million, high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising attention from applicants. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line (neutral/mixed), but no significant gaps were recorded in 2025–2026. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Instrument Science and Technology A, Civil Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, Software Engineering A, etc., with extremely outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment directions of HIT such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were all in high heat/recommended status in 2024–2025, with social heat remaining relatively high. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Shanghai is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025, with a significant expansion in candidate scale and a notable increase in competitive pressure. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Shanghai geographically, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The enrollment plan in Shanghai is only 7, accounting for a small proportion. Regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Shanghai candidates' application decisions, but the C9 prestigious university aura can partially offset this.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal fluctuation of the 2025 ranking dropping significantly to 4096, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the surge in total candidates by about 35%, and the enhanced attractiveness due to the rise in HIT's Soft Science ranking, it is expected that competition in 2026 will rebound compared to 2025, with a slight forward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 4016, with a range of 3558–4474.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligent Systems Academician Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhongguancun Class) (Deep integration with Zhongguancun College)
- Embodied Intelligence (Greater Bay Area Class) (Training location at Shenzhen Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, HIT will only recruit 7 students in Shanghai (all requiring Physics and Chemistry), with all majors being Engineering Experimental Classes/Special Classes, at a very high level. For rankings within the predicted range of 3558–4474, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3558), focus on sprinting for the Academician Special Class and Future Technology Top Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>4474), it is recommended to use Embodied Intelligence (Greater Bay Area Class) or Artificial Intelligence (Zhongguancun Class) as a safety net. All majors require both Physics and Chemistry, so candidates must confirm that their subject selections meet the requirements.
